machine.name: AI Wellness Coach
machine.description: Bridge machine that consumes PatientWellness emissions (wellness-level classification for assisted-living residents) and produces AI-driven coaching recommendations. Integrates the Health Services domain (PatientWellness input) with the AI domain (inference-driven recommendation): reads the 4-level wellness metric (OPTIMAL / GOOD / ALERT / CRITICAL) and emits coaching actions — maintain baseline, targeted enrichment, clinical escalation, or urgent multidisciplinary huddle — along with ancillary triggers for family notification, activity scheduling, care-plan revision, and on-call paging.

crossDomain.writes: healthservices actions (care-team alerts, family outreach) via AI inference (region 220..228)
crossDomain.rationale: Demonstrates integration between Health Services and AI domains. Classified as AI (inference producer) while operating on and feeding back into health-domain signals.

outputDimensions.name: COACH_MAINTAIN_BASELINE
outputDimensions.description: Optimal path — continue current plan, reinforce protective factors

outputDimensions.name: COACH_TARGETED_ENRICHMENT
outputDimensions.description: Good path — prescribe a specific enrichment program (stress, social, or nutrition)

outputDimensions.name: COACH_CLINICAL_ESCALATE
outputDimensions.description: Alert path — refer to clinician for care plan review

outputDimensions.name: COACH_URGENT_HUDDLE
outputDimensions.description: Critical path — trigger multidisciplinary care conference within 24h

outputDimensions.name: NOTIFY_FAMILY
outputDimensions.description: Page designated family contact with wellness status update

outputDimensions.name: ACT_SCHEDULE_ACTIVITY
outputDimensions.description: Schedule an AI-recommended enrichment activity on the resident calendar

outputDimensions.name: ACT_REVISE_CARE_PLAN
outputDimensions.description: Open a care-plan revision task in the clinical workflow

outputDimensions.name: ACT_PAGE_ONCALL_CLINICIAN
outputDimensions.description: Page the on-call attending physician for immediate consultation

governance.notes: Auto-backfilled by scripts/backfill-governance.mjs from primaryDomain="ai-services".  Review and tune the routing as the team owning AIWellnessCoach matures.

rules.description: Maintain baseline care plan; AI schedules a protective-factor enrichment activity (e.g., peer mentoring, reminiscence group) to reinforce wellness.
AI-selected enrichment program (stress-reduction, social, or nutritional) plus optional family update. Activity added to the resident calendar.
Clinical escalation: refer to care team for review, open care-plan revision task, notify family of status change.
Urgent multidisciplinary huddle within 24h. On-call clinician paged, family notified, care plan revision initiated.

sequences.name: Optimal Wellness — Maintain & Reinforce
sequences.description: Resident is thriving (PatientWellness emitted OPTIMAL). AI coach reinforces current plan and schedules a protective enrichment activity.

metadata.description: Maintain baseline care plan; AI schedules a protective-factor enrichment activity (e.g., peer mentoring, reminiscence group) to reinforce wellness.

sequences.name: Good Wellness — Targeted Enrichment Program
sequences.description: PatientWellness emitted GOOD — five of six dimensions in norm with a single gap. AI coach prescribes a targeted enrichment program and offers a non-urgent family update.

metadata.description: AI-selected enrichment program (stress-reduction, social, or nutritional) plus optional family update. Activity added to the resident calendar.

sequences.name: Alert Wellness — Clinical Escalation with Family Outreach
sequences.description: PatientWellness emitted ALERT — multiple deficits with active decline trend. AI coach escalates to the clinical team, opens a care-plan revision task, and notifies family.

metadata.description: Clinical escalation: refer to care team for review, open care-plan revision task, notify family of status change.

sequences.name: Critical Wellness — Urgent Multidisciplinary Huddle
sequences.description: PatientWellness emitted CRITICAL — mental acuity failure with established decline trend. AI coach pages on-call clinician, triggers urgent multidisciplinary huddle, revises care plan, and immediately notifies family.

metadata.description: Urgent multidisciplinary huddle within 24h. On-call clinician paged, family notified, care plan revision initiated.

inputSequences.name: Optimal resident — maintain plan
inputSequences.description: PatientWellness OPTIMAL emission (Level 4). Expect COACH_MAINTAIN_BASELINE + ACT_SCHEDULE_ACTIVITY.

metadata.scenario: Thriving resident, bi-weekly check-in — AI recommends protective-factor enrichment

inputSequences.name: Good wellness — bereavement recovery
inputSequences.description: PatientWellness GOOD emission (Level 3) during bereavement recovery. Expect COACH_TARGETED_ENRICHMENT + NOTIFY_FAMILY + ACT_SCHEDULE_ACTIVITY.

metadata.scenario: Post-bereavement stress gap — AI selects a stress-reduction program

inputSequences.name: Alert wellness — new diagnosis burden
inputSequences.description: PatientWellness ALERT emission (Level 2) following a new type-2 diabetes diagnosis. Expect COACH_CLINICAL_ESCALATE + NOTIFY_FAMILY + ACT_REVISE_CARE_PLAN.

metadata.scenario: Multiple wellness deficits with declining trajectory — AI triggers clinical review

inputSequences.name: Critical wellness — cognitive decline threshold crossed
inputSequences.description: PatientWellness CRITICAL emission (Level 1) — mental acuity below cohort norm with established decline. Expect COACH_URGENT_HUDDLE + NOTIFY_FAMILY + ACT_REVISE_CARE_PLAN + ACT_PAGE_ONCALL_CLINICIAN.

metadata.scenario: Cognitive decline crossed clinical threshold — AI fires the highest-severity coaching response
